use_cases: Decorative animated background for hero sections on landing pages
Visual atmosphere for marketing websites and SaaS product pages
Animated backdrop for full-screen presentations or sign-up pages
Dynamic gradient visual for fintech dashboard hero areas
Eye-catching background for e-commerce product showcase sections
ai_summary: A decorative animated background component featuring vertical gradient bars that pulse with a smooth breathing animation. The bars use a calculated height distribution pattern creating a bell-curve effect, with customizable colors, bar count, and animation timing. Built as a full-viewport absolute positioned element with hardware-accelerated CSS animations for smooth performance.
